name: countersign
description: Kill switch + spend guard for AI agents that spend money, across every wallet vendor at once.
long_description: Countersign is a neutral, cross-vendor control plane for AI agents that transact. One policy, one sub-second freeze (kill switch), and one tamper-evident audit ledger across multiple agent-wallet and card backends at once. These tools govern a running Countersign Core: check a spend against policy before it executes (x402 and AP2 included), freeze everything instantly, review and resolve human approvals, and read the signed ledger. Testnet only; Countersign never takes custody of funds.

countersign_url.title: Countersign Core URL
countersign_url.description: Base URL of the Countersign Core to govern (hosted or self-hosted).

countersign_api_key.title: API key
countersign_api_key.description: API key for the Core (self-serve one at https://app.countersign.network/start).
